IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: GIPA exists to make IP less intimidating so that people can successfully bring their ideas to market. We provide the resources expertise and connections to ensure peoples ideas can become a profitable reality. Just when innovators and creators have become such a vital contributor of our economy and the need for IP has become more apparent IP has gotten a bad reputation. The need for someone to make sense of it all has become so important. GIPA makes IP less intimidating so that people can successfully bring their ideas to market. When people come in contact with us we can assure them that no one can provide better resources expertise and connections to ensure their ideas can become a profitable reality.
IRS990.MissionDesc: GIPA exists to make IP less intimidating so that people can successfully bring their ideas to market. We provide the resources expertise and connections to ensure peoples ideas can become a profitable reality. Just when innovators and creators have become such a vital contributor of our economy and the need for IP has become more apparent IP has gotten a bad reputation. The need for someone to make sense of it all has become so important. GIPA makes IP less intimidating so that people can successfully bring their ideas to market. When people come in contact with us we can assure them that no one can provide better resources expertise and connections to ensure their ideas can become a profitable reality.
IRS990.Desc: Intellectual Property Celebration is an event consisting of panel discussions key speakers and social events to discuss topics of interest to the intellectual property community and to provide venues for networking.

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: Intellectual Property Legends Award is an event held every three years which awards individuals who have made an noteworthy contribution to the intellectual property eco-system in the State of Georgia

ProgSrvcAccomActy3Grp.Desc: Southeaster Intellectual Property Job Fair SIPJF is the largest job fair in the southeast dedicated to intellectual professionals. The job fair brings together law school graduates and firms around the US seeking intellectual property alliance lawyers.

ProgSrvcAccomActyOtherGrp.Desc: Consist of two other events. An Intellectual Property Leadership Award and a Startup Awards. The awards events gave monetary awards to individuals and or organizations showing leadership in support of the intellectual property community and had formed a startup company with a creative product respectively

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: Intellectual Property Celebration Event which is a series of discussion panels key speakers and social events to discuss current issues in the Intellectual Property area and to provide venues for intellectual property professionals to network.
Form 990 was reviewed by the President Secretary and Executive director before filing and is available to all members upon request
All officers sign a conflict of interest policy.
